data.title: US Investigating Leak Of 'Highly Classified' Documents On Israel's Alleged Plans To Attack Iran
data.description: The U.S. government has initiated an investigation into the unauthorized release of "highly classified" documents. These classified documents, which detail Israel's plans to attack Iran, were found posted on the messaging platform, Telegram.

data.title: Biden's Farewell To Africa: Strategic Motives Behind First And Only Presidential Visit
Key Battlegrounds Heat Up As Trump Gains Ground In Critical States
data.description: As the November 5 election approaches, Trump gains ground in key battleground states while Harris maintains a narrow lead nationally, vying to become the first female president.

data.title: Newsom Sides With Musk In Dispute Over California SpaceX Launches
data.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-Calif.) has expressed his support for Elon Musk in the billionaire's dispute with a California agency that rejected an expansion of SpaceX's rocket launches along the Pacific coast.

data.title: Bill Gates Had A 'Very Bad Habit' That Could Have Derailed His Career
data.description: While at Harvard, Bill Gates had a bad habit he liked to show off. The habit was later fixed as it wasn't something in the business world appreciated.
